task: Create a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events with a 5-minute timeout and 512MB memory allocation
solution_criteria: Valid JSON with Lambda timeout set to 300 seconds, memory set to 512, and proper S3 event trigger configuration

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns a list of all object keys in that bucket using boto3
solution_criteria: Function uses boto3 S3 client, correctly calls list_objects_v2 or similar method, handles pagination if necessary, and returns a list of keys

task: Create a regular expression that validates an AWS IAM ARN format (arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/MyRole)
solution_criteria: Regex correctly matches valid IAM ARNs, captures account ID and resource path, rejects invalid formats, and works with various resource types (role, user, policy)
